blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,239 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
